code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut max_val = 0
mut has_pos = false
mut current = ""
let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  let is_end = i == n
  let b = if is_end
    32
  else
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          if not has_pos
            max_val = v
            has_pos = true
          else if v > max_val
            max_val = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has_pos
  print("max=#{max_val}")
else
  print("none")
end
